chapter_title.ar: باب فِيهِ نُكَتٌ وَ نُتَفٌ مِنَ التَّنْزِيلِ فِي الْوَلَايَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 108 – Points and pickings from the Revelation regarding the Wilayah

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالسابق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (68/ 5)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: كالسابق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (68/ 5)
text: هِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ رَبِّ اغْفِرْ لِي وَ لِوالِدَيَّ وَ لِمَنْ دَخَلَ بَيْتِيَ مُؤْمِناً يَعْنِي الْوَلَايَةَ مَنْ دَخَلَ فِي الْوَلَايَةِ دَخَلَ فِي بَيْتِ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ ( عليهم السلام )

وَ قَوْلُهُ إِنَّما يُرِيدُ اللَّهُ لِيُذْهِبَ عَنْكُمُ الرِّجْسَ أَهْلَ الْبَيْتِ وَ يُطَهِّرَكُمْ تَطْهِيراً يَعْنِي الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) وَ وَلَايَتَهُمْ مَنْ دَخَلَ فِيهَا دَخَلَ فِي بَيْتِ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ibn Fazzal, from Al Mufazzal Bin Salih, from Muhammad Bin Ali Al Halby,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws regarding the Words of the Mighty and Majestic [71:28] My Lord! Forgive me and my parents and him who enters my house believing – Meaning the Wilayah. The one who enteres into the Wilayah enters into the House of the Prophetsas’.

And Hisazwj Words [33:33] But rather, Allah Desires to Keep away the uncleanness from you, O people of the House! And to Purify you a with a Purification – Meaning the Imamsasws and theirasws Wilayah. The one who enters into it, enters into the House of the Prophetsaww’.
en.sarwar: 54. Through the same chain of narrators it is narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ‘Umar ibn ‘Abd al-‘Aziz from Muhammad ibn al-Fudayl who has said the following “I asked al-Rida (a.s.) about the words of Allah. “(Muhammad), tell them, “To be happy with the favors and mercy of God is better than whatever you accumulate.” [10:58] The Imam (a.s.) said, “To acknowledge the Wilaya of the family of Muhammad (s.a.) is better than all that they accumulate of the worldly gains.”
